channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ring-augmented gastric bypass may not improve weight loss over conventional procedure
item.description: 1. Ring-augmented OAGB shows similar safety to conventional OAGB at one year. Evidence Rating Level: 1 (Excellent) R...

item.title: Psilocybin shows benefit in real-world treatment-resistant depression
item.description: One of the first real-world studies of psilocybin therapy indicates meaningful improvements in treatment-resistant depression outside controlled settings.

item.title: How to lead a team through uncertainty without breaking trust [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! Patients notice when you are not fully present, and trust is...

item.title: Drop flare fears to fix rheumatic vaccination gaps
item.description: Vaccination remains the best protection for immunosuppressed patients, but new evidence suggests a need to rethink scheduling. Medscape Medical News
